name: woohyuk-coding-plugin
description: Personal Codex workflows for review, design implementation, documentation, implementation planning, plan execution, PRs, changelogs, testing, release checks, commit messages, and LLM wiki lookup.

interface.shortDescription: Review, design, docs, plans, PR, and wiki workflows.
interface.longDescription: Woohyuk Coding Plugin provides personal Codex skills for reviewing code, using Pencil .pen design files, maintaining README files, documenting project architecture, writing ADRs, writing subgoal-based implementation plans, executing saved plans with Ralph one verified subgoal at a time, planning tests, running visual QA, checking public release readiness, drafting commit messages, preparing PR content, updating changelogs, checking documentation consistency, and searching the local LLM wiki.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use woohyuk-coding-plugin for code review, Pencil design implementation, docs, implementation plans, Ralph plan execution, PRs, changelogs, tests, release checks, commit messages, or LLM wiki lookup.
